description: An input that allows users to add their seller/representative code to link the order to a specific salesperson. Validates the code against the store API and applies the association.
Displays a badge when the cart total meets the free shipping threshold. Shows progress toward the threshold when below it.
A text area for customers to add a personalized gift message to their order. Supports character limits and emoji filtering.
Renders custom payment instructions based on the selected payment method (e.g., PIX QR code, boleto barcode, bank transfer details).
Shows the customer's available loyalty points and allows partial/full redemption during checkout.
A checkbox component for newsletter subscription opt-in during checkout. Pre-checked based on store config.
Displays estimated delivery dates for each shipping option. Fetches estimates from the platform API via SDK.
Allows inline customization of cart items (e.g., engraving text, color selection) before proceeding to payment.
